mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.FID, t.FBillNo, t.orderStatus, t.Document_type, t.FDate, bd.fnumber AS FCustId, t.F_ora_BaseProperty, t.F_khhth, sc.contact_name AS F_kglxr, t.F_cty_BaseProperty1, byd_settle.name AS FSettleCurrId, t.F_tcbl, t.F_KHSD, t.FIsIncludedTax, t.F_sfbg, se.fname AS FSalerId, t.F_lrl, t.F_jlrl, t.F_gj, bdy_trade.name AS F_myfs, t.F_zyxb, fi.account_name AS F_yhzh, t.F_cty_Date, t.F_sygs, bld_rec.name AS FRecConditionId, bdc_pack.name AS Fbzfs, t.FReceiveId, bc.fname AS FSettleId, bc.fname AS FSettleAddress, t.FChargeId, t.F_shhl, t.F_shzt, t.F_shje, t.F_cty_Date1, su.user_name AS FCreatorId, t.FCreateDate, sur.user_name AS FModifierId, t.FModifyDate, t.FAllDisCount, t.F_ysbl1, t.FBillTaxAmount, t.FBillAmount, bdty_local.name AS FLocalCurrId, t.FExchangeTypeId, t.FExchangeRate, t.fplannotrecamount, t.fplanallrecamount, t.fplanrefundamount FROM t_sale_order t
LEFT JOIN bd_customer bd ON bd.fcustid = t.FCustId LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc ON bc.fcustid = t.FSettleId
LEFT JOIN supplier_contact sc ON sc.customer_number = t.F_kglxr
LEFT JOIN sys_employee se ON se.salesman_id = t.FSalerId
LEFT JOIN financial_information fi ON fi.k3_id = t.F_yhzh LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byd_settle ON byd_settle.kingdee = t.FSettleCurrId AND byd_settle.category = 'currency'
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdy_trade ON bdy_trade.kingdee = t.F_myfs AND bdy_trade.category = 'trade_way' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdty_local ON bdty_local.kingdee = t.FLocalCurrId AND bdty_local.category = 'currency'
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld_rec ON bld_rec.kingdee = t.FRecConditionId AND bld_rec.category = 'collection_terms'
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdc_pack ON bdc_pack.kingdee = t.Fbzfs AND bdc_pack.category = 'manner_packing'
LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.k3_key = t.FCreatorId LEFT JOIN sys_user sur ON sur.k3_key = t.FModifierId WHERE t.fid = #{fid}

SELECT t.id, t.FID, t.orderStatus, t.Document_type, t.FBillNo, t.FDate, bd.fnumber AS FCustId, t.F_ora_BaseProperty, t.F_khhth, CASE WHEN t.F_kglxr = 0 THEN NULL ELSE sc.contact_name END AS F_kglxr, t.F_cty_BaseProperty1, byd_settle.NAME AS FSettleCurrId, t.F_tcbl, t.F_KHSD, t.FIsIncludedTax, t.F_sfbg, se.fname AS FSalerId, t.F_lrl, t.F_jlrl, t.F_gj, bdy_trade.NAME AS F_myfs, t.F_zyxb, fi.account_name AS F_yhzh, t.F_cty_Date, t.F_sygs, bld_rec.NAME AS FRecConditionId, bdc_pack.NAME AS Fbzfs, t.FReceiveId, bc.fname AS FSettleId, bc.fname AS FSettleAddress, t.FChargeId, t.F_shhl, t.F_shzt, t.F_shje, t.F_cty_Date1, su.user_name AS FCreatorId, t.FCreateDate, sur.user_name AS FModifierId, t.FModifyDate, t.FAllDisCount, t.F_ysbl1, t.FBillTaxAmount, t.FBillAmount, bdty_local.NAME AS FLocalCurrId, t.FExchangeTypeId, t.FExchangeRate, t.fplannotrecamount, t.fplanallrecamount, t.fplanrefundamount FROM t_sale_order t LEFT JOIN bd_customer bd ON bd.fcustid = t.FCustId LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc ON bc.fcustid = t.FSettleId LEFT JOIN supplier_contact sc ON sc.k3_id = t.F_kglxr AND t.F_kglxr <> 0 LEFT JOIN sys_employee se ON se.salesman_id = t.FSalerId LEFT JOIN financial_information fi ON fi.k3_id = t.F_yhzh LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byd_settle ON byd_settle.kingdee = t.FSettleCurrId AND byd_settle.category = 'currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdy_trade ON bdy_trade.kingdee = t.F_myfs AND bdy_trade.category = 'trade_way' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdty_local ON bdty_local.kingdee = t.FLocalCurrId AND bdty_local.category = 'currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld_rec ON bld_rec.kingdee = t.FRecConditionId AND bld_rec.category = 'collection_terms' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdc_pack ON bdc_pack.kingdee = t.Fbzfs AND bdc_pack.category = 'manner_packing' LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.k3_key = t.FCreatorId LEFT JOIN sys_user sur ON sur.k3_key = t.FModifierId WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_sale_order ( FID, FBillNo,orderStatus,Document_type, FDate, FCustId, F_ora_BaseProperty, F_khhth, F_kglxr, F_cty_BaseProperty1, FSettleCurrId, F_tcbl, F_KHSD, FIsIncludedTax, F_sfbg, FSalerId, F_lrl, F_jlrl, F_gj,fstate, F_myfs, F_zyxb, F_yhzh, F_cty_Date, F_sygs, FRecConditionId, Fbzfs, FReceiveId, FSettleId, FSettleAddress, FChargeId, F_shhl, F_shzt, F_shje, F_cty_Date1, FCreatorId, FCreateDate, FModifierId, FModifyDate, FAllDisCount, F_ysbl1, FBillTaxAmount, FBillAmount, FLocalCurrId, FExchangeTypeId, FExchangeRate, fplannotrecamount, fplanallrecamount, fplanrefundamount ) VALUES ( #{fid}, #{fBillNo},#{orderStatus}, #{documentType}, #{fDate}, #{fCustId}, #{fOraBaseProperty}, #{fKhhth}, #{fKglxr}, #{fCtyBaseProperty1}, #{fSettleCurrId}, #{fTcbl}, #{fKhsd}, #{fIsIncludedTax}, #{fSfbg}, #{fSalerId}, #{fLrl}, #{fJlrl}, #{fGj},#{fstate}, #{fMyfs}, #{fZyxb}, #{fYhzh}, #{fCtyDate}, #{fSygs}, #{fRecConditionId}, #{fbzfs}, #{fReceiveId}, #{fSettleId}, #{fSettleAddress}, #{fChargeId}, #{fShhl}, #{fShzt}, #{fShje}, #{fCtyDate1}, #{fCreatorId}, #{fCreateDate}, #{fModifierId}, #{fModifyDate}, #{fAllDisCount}, #{fYsbl1}, #{fBillTaxAmount}, #{fBillAmount}, #{fLocalCurrId}, #{fExchangeTypeId}, #{fExchangeRate}, #{fPlannotRecAmount}, #{fPlanAllRecAmount}, #{fPlanRefundAmount} )

INSERT INTO t_sale_order ( FID, FBillNo,orderStatus,Document_type, FDate, FCustId, F_ora_BaseProperty, F_khhth, F_kglxr, F_cty_BaseProperty1, FSettleCurrId, F_tcbl, F_KHSD, FIsIncludedTax, F_sfbg, FSalerId, F_lrl, F_jlrl, F_gj,fstate, F_myfs, F_zyxb, F_yhzh, F_cty_Date, F_sygs, FRecConditionId, Fbzfs, FReceiveId, FSettleId, FSettleAddress, FChargeId, F_shhl, F_shzt, F_shje, F_cty_Date1, FCreatorId, FCreateDate, FModifierId, FModifyDate, FAllDisCount, F_ysbl1, FBillTaxAmount, FBillAmount, FLocalCurrId, FExchangeTypeId, FExchangeRate, fplannotrecamount, fplanallrecamount, fplanrefundamount ) VALUES
( #{item.fid}, #{item.fBillNo},#{item.orderStatus}, #{item.documentType}, #{item.fDate}, #{item.fCustId}, #{item.fOraBaseProperty}, #{item.fKhhth}, #{item.fKglxr}, #{item.fCtyBaseProperty1}, #{item.fSettleCurrId}, #{item.fTcbl}, #{item.fKhsd}, #{item.fIsIncludedTax}, #{item.fSfbg}, #{item.fSalerId}, #{item.fLrl}, #{item.fJlrl}, #{item.fGj}, #{item.fstate}, #{item.fMyfs}, #{item.fZyxb}, #{item.fYhzh}, #{item.fCtyDate}, #{item.fSygs}, #{item.fRecConditionId}, #{item.fbzfs}, #{item.fReceiveId}, #{item.fSettleId}, #{item.fSettleAddress}, #{item.fChargeId}, #{item.fShhl}, #{item.fShzt}, #{item.fShje}, #{item.fCtyDate1}, #{item.fCreatorId}, #{item.fCreateDate}, #{item.fModifierId}, #{item.fModifyDate}, #{item.fAllDisCount}, #{item.fYsbl1}, #{item.fBillTaxAmount}, #{item.fBillAmount}, #{item.fLocalCurrId}, #{item.fExchangeTypeId}, #{item.fExchangeRate}, #{item.fPlannotRecAmount}, #{item.fPlanAllRecAmount}, #{item.fPlanRefundAmount} )
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.FID, t.orderStatus, t.Document_type, t.FBillNo, t.FDate, bd.fnumber AS FCustId, t.F_ora_BaseProperty, t.F_khhth, sc.contact_name AS F_kglxr, t.F_cty_BaseProperty1, byd_settle.name AS FSettleCurrId, t.F_tcbl, t.F_KHSD, t.FIsIncludedTax, t.F_sfbg, se.fname AS FSalerId, t.F_lrl, t.F_jlrl, cy.name_zh AS F_gj, bdy_trade.name AS F_myfs, t.F_zyxb, fi.account_name AS F_yhzh, t.F_cty_Date, t.F_sygs, bld_rec.name AS FRecConditionId, bdc_pack.name AS Fbzfs, t.FReceiveId, bc.fname AS FSettleId, bc.fname AS FSettleAddress, t.FChargeId, t.F_shhl, t.F_shzt, t.F_shje, t.F_cty_Date1, su.user_name AS FCreatorId, t.FCreateDate, sur.user_name AS FModifierId, t.FModifyDate, t.FAllDisCount, t.F_ysbl1, t.FBillTaxAmount, t.FBillAmount, bdty_local.name AS FLocalCurrId, t.FExchangeTypeId, t.FExchangeRate, t.fplannotrecamount, t.fplanallrecamount, t.fplanrefundamount FROM t_sale_order t
JOIN bd_customer bd ON bd.fcustid = t.FCustId
AND bd.fnumber = #{query.fCustId}
LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc ON bc.fcustid = t.FSettleId
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT k3_id, MAX(contact_name) AS contact_name FROM supplier_contact GROUP BY k3_id ) sc ON sc.k3_id = t.F_kglxr
LEFT JOIN sys_employee se ON se.salesman_id = t.FSalerId
LEFT JOIN financial_information fi ON fi.k3_id = t.F_yhzh
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT kingdee, category, MAX(name) AS name FROM bymaterial_dictionary GROUP BY kingdee, category ) byd_settle ON byd_settle.kingdee = t.FSettleCurrId AND byd_settle.category = 'currency'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT kingdee, category, MAX(name) AS name FROM bymaterial_dictionary GROUP BY kingdee, category ) bdy_trade ON bdy_trade.kingdee = t.F_myfs AND bdy_trade.category = 'trade_way'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT kingdee, category, MAX(name) AS name FROM bymaterial_dictionary GROUP BY kingdee, category ) bdty_local ON bdty_local.kingdee = t.FLocalCurrId AND bdty_local.category = 'currency'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT kingdee, category, MAX(name) AS name FROM bymaterial_dictionary GROUP BY kingdee, category ) bld_rec ON bld_rec.kingdee = t.FRecConditionId AND bld_rec.category = 'collection_terms'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT kingdee, category, MAX(name) AS name FROM bymaterial_dictionary GROUP BY kingdee, category ) bdc_pack ON bdc_pack.kingdee = t.Fbzfs AND bdc_pack.category = 'manner_packing'
LEFT JOIN country cy ON cy.id = t.F_gj
LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.k3_key = t.FCreatorId LEFT JOIN sys_user sur ON sur.k3_key = t.FModifierId
AND t.FBillNo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.fBillNo}, '%')
AND t.F_ora_BaseProperty LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.fOraBaseProperty}, '%')
AND se.fname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.fSalerId}, '%')
AND t.F_khhth LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.fKhhth}, '%')
AND sc.contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.fKglxr}, '%')
AND t.F_sfbg = #{query.fSfbg}
AND t.Document_type = #{query.documentType}
AND t.F_shzt = #{query.fShzt}
AND DATE(t.FDate) = DATE(#{query.fDate})
ORDER BY t.FID DESC

SELECT se.fname AS salerName, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM t_sale_order tso LEFT JOIN sys_employee se ON se.salesman_id = tso.FSalerId WHERE tso.FDate IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(tso.FDate) = #{year} AND MONTH(tso.FDate) = #{month} GROUP BY se.fname ORDER BY orderCount DESC

SELECT cy.name_zh AS countryName, cy.name_en AS countryNameEn, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM t_sale_order tso LEFT JOIN country cy ON cy.id = tso.F_gj WHERE tso.FDate IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(tso.FDate) = #{year} AND MONTH(tso.FDate) = #{month} GROUP BY tso.F_gj, cy.name_zh, cy.name_en ORDER BY orderCount DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrderCount FROM t_sale_order tso WHERE tso.FDate IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(tso.FDate) = #{year} AND MONTH(tso.FDate) = #{month}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_sale_order t WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT t.fstate AS countryName, t.fstate AS countryNameEn, COUNT(1) AS orderCount FROM t_sale_order t WHERE t.fstate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.fstate ORDER BY orderCount DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_sale_order t WHERE t.FDate >= DATE_SUB(
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-', #{month}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
, INTERVAL 1 MONTH ) AND t.FDate
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-', #{month}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT t.id, t.FID, t.orderStatus, t.Document_type, t.FBillNo, t.FDate, bd.fnumber AS FCustId, t.F_ora_BaseProperty, t.F_khhth, CASE WHEN t.F_kglxr = 0 THEN NULL ELSE sc.contact_name END AS F_kglxr, t.F_cty_BaseProperty1, byd_settle.NAME AS FSettleCurrId, t.F_tcbl, t.F_KHSD, t.FIsIncludedTax, t.F_sfbg, se.fname AS FSalerId, t.F_lrl, t.F_jlrl, t.F_gj, bdy_trade.NAME AS F_myfs, t.F_zyxb, fi.account_name AS F_yhzh, t.F_cty_Date, t.F_sygs, bld_rec.NAME AS FRecConditionId, bdc_pack.NAME AS Fbzfs, t.FReceiveId, bc.fname AS FSettleId, bc.fname AS FSettleAddress, t.FChargeId, t.F_shhl, t.F_shzt, t.F_shje, t.F_cty_Date1, su.user_name AS FCreatorId, t.FCreateDate, sur.user_name AS FModifierId, t.FModifyDate, t.FAllDisCount, t.F_ysbl1, t.FBillTaxAmount, t.FBillAmount, bdty_local.NAME AS FLocalCurrId, t.FExchangeTypeId, t.FExchangeRate, t.fplannotrecamount, t.fplanallrecamount, t.fplanrefundamount FROM t_sale_order t LEFT JOIN bd_customer bd ON bd.fcustid = t.FCustId LEFT JOIN bd_customer bc ON bc.fcustid = t.FSettleId LEFT JOIN supplier_contact sc ON sc.k3_id = t.F_kglxr AND t.F_kglxr != 0 LEFT JOIN sys_employee se ON se.salesman_id = t.FSalerId LEFT JOIN financial_information fi ON fi.k3_id = t.F_yhzh LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byd_settle ON byd_settle.kingdee = t.FSettleCurrId AND byd_settle.category = 'currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdy_trade ON bdy_trade.kingdee = t.F_myfs AND bdy_trade.category = 'trade_way' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdty_local ON bdty_local.kingdee = t.FLocalCurrId AND bdty_local.category = 'currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld_rec ON bld_rec.kingdee = t.FRecConditionId AND bld_rec.category = 'collection_terms' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdc_pack ON bdc_pack.kingdee = t.Fbzfs AND bdc_pack.category = 'manner_packing' LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.k3_key = t.FCreatorId LEFT JOIN sys_user sur ON sur.k3_key = t.FModifierId WHERE t.FBillNo = #{billNo}
